intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 (matrix.mtx.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz). Using scanpy, do standard QC, normalization, highly-variable genes, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering and a UMAP, then identify marker genes per cluster and show me a UMAP and a marker dotplot.

blocks.text: Good. I can see the GSM5746268 triplet is present. Now I'll load it and run the standard scanpy QC + clustering workflow. Let me read the `scrna-qc-clustering` skill first to ensure I follow best practices:

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "description": "Standard scanpy processing for ONE scRNA-seq sample.", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + first-pass clustering (scanpy). Halt and present_plan before running on an unfamiliar dataset \u2014 the QC thresholds and the clustering resolution are dataset-dependent. Steps: sc.read_10x_mtx; calculate_qc_metrics; filter cells (n_genes>=200) & genes; filter pct_counts_mt; normalize_total(target_sum=1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; scale; pca; neighbors; leiden; umap; rank_genes_groups (wilcoxon) for markers. Plots: QC violin, HVG, UMAP colored by leiden, marker dotplot."}

blocks.text: Perfect. Before I run the workflow, I need to check the data briefly and propose sensible QC thresholds. Let me load the matrix and do a quick inspection:

input.code:
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Load the 10x matrix for GSM5746268
prefix = 'GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1'
adata = sc.read_10x_mtx(f'{DATA_DIR}/{prefix}', 
                        gex_only=False)
print(f"Loaded matrix shape: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Features (genes): {adata.n_vars}")
print(f"Observations (cells/barcodes): {adata.n_obs}")

# Inspect feature names (gene IDs)
print(f"\nFirst 5 gene feature names:\n{adata.var.index[:5].tolist()}")
print(f"Feature vars columns: {adata.var.columns.tolist()}")

# Inspect barcodes
print(f"\nFirst 5 barcodes:\n{adata.obs.index[:5].tolist()}")
print(f"Data type: {adata.X.dtype}")
print(f"Matrix density: {adata.X.nnz / (adata.n_obs * adata.n_vars):.3f}")
